dailyNews.title: Convicted spyware maker Bryan Fleming avoids jail at sentencing
dailyNews.description: The pcTattletale founder escapes a custodial sentence following the first successful prosecution of a spyware maker in the U.S. for over a decade.

dailyNews.title: The US could still try to play the ethnic card in Iran
dailyNews.description: But past experience and current geopolitical realities show such a strategy is doomed to failure.

dailyNews.title: How US operation to rescue air officer from Iran unfolded
dailyNews.description: President Trump says US service member whose fighter jet was shot down over Iran is rescued during two raids.

dailyNews.title: How rescue of US airman in remote part of Iran unfolded
dailyNews.description: The operation to extract him from the ground in hostile territory was hugely complex and involved multiple US government agencies.

dailyNews.title: Has Trump confirmed Iran’s claim that protesters were US-armed?
dailyNews.description: US president says Washington armed Kurdish Iranian opposition groups during the January demonstrations.

dailyNews.title: DR Congo agrees to take deportees from the US
dailyNews.description: The country will start receiving deportees from this month but has not said how many they will accept.

dailyNews.title: 'Full House' star Dave Coulier warns 'everything in my life was toxic' before cancer battle
dailyNews.description: "Full House" star Dave Coulier opens up about replacing toxic everyday products after surviving two cancer diagnoses, inspiring his new venture Awear Market.

dailyNews.title: NPR public editor admits glaring absence of Jewish victim's voices in coverage of Michigan synagogue attack
dailyNews.description: The NPR public editor admitted important Jewish voices were missing from coverage of the March attack on Temple Israel synagogue in West Bloomfield, Michigan.

dailyNews.title: Son of Hollywood director accused of years of sexual, racial abuse of water polo teammate at ritzy prep school
dailyNews.description: A Harvard-Westlake water polo player alleges years of racial and sexual abuse by teammates, including the son of a well-known Hollywood film director.

dailyNews.title: Iran executes people, including teens, by hanging
dailyNews.description: The nation of Iran has been carrying out executions, including of teenagers, as the U.S. and Israel wage war against the country, reports indicate.

dailyNews.title: Sky trade Angel Reese in stunning move before WNBA season begins: reports
dailyNews.description: Angel Reese, one of the WNBA's top rebounders, was reportedly traded to the Atlanta Dream from the Chicago Sky as free agency officially opened Monday.

dailyNews.title: Trump reveals Iran made 'significant proposal' after ultimatum, but 'not good enough'
dailyNews.description: Trump tells reporters at the White House Easter Egg Roll that Iran made a significant proposal but says it is not good enough amid ongoing strikes.

dailyNews.title: American tourists warned of arrest, jail time for taking photos, pocketing souvenirs in locale
dailyNews.description: The U.S. State Department updated its Ethiopia travel advisory, warning American travelers of unrest, strict currency rules, photography bans and $3,000 exit fees.

dailyNews.title: American woman missing after husband says she fell overboard, swept to sea during Bahamas boat trip: police
dailyNews.description: An American woman is missing after falling off a boat near Hope Town in the Bahamas. Authorities say strong currents swept her into the ocean.

dailyNews.title: Pro wrestling star Trevor Lee signs MLW deal, talks goals with company
dailyNews.description: Pro wrestling star Trevor Lee signs with MLW and will continue as the Southern Crown champion after his release from WWE as Cameron Grimes years ago.

topStories.title: On Iran, Trump Keeps World Off Balance With Ever-Changing Threats
topStories.description: Global leaders are struggling in their efforts to find a way to end the American-Israeli war on Iran, and they are spooked about what President Trump might do next.

topStories.description: The Trump administration’s campaign to curtail international students is not just hitting the elite schools targeted by the government.

dailyNews.title: Sen. Kaine skeptical Congress will pass $1.5T military budget
dailyNews.description: Sen. Tim Kaine, D-Va., expressed skepticism on “Meet the Press” Sunday about the Trump administration’s 2027 budget plan, which includes a request of $1.5 trillion from Congress to fund the Defense Department.

dailyNews.description: The Treasury Department designated BNY as the financial agent to manage Trump accounts. BNY will also partner with Robinhood on a Trump accounts app.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  President Trump threatens Iran if no peace deal reached soon
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Sunday that if no peace deal is reached with Iran in the next 48 hours, "we're blowing up the entire country." ABC News' Selina Wang reports from the White House.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.
